response.justification: Maria is an experienced, versatile engineer with strong web/full-stack credentials and some systems-level background, but her profile diverges significantly from this role's core requirements. Her hands-on C++ experience is limited to a ~7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a bachelor thesis project, while the last decade has centered on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. She shows no evidence of MQTT, message-broker architectures at industrial scale, IEC 62443/SDL practices, or industrial-automation domain exposure, all of which are central to this position.
strengths: Strong systems-programming fundamentals: low-latency, async I/O services handling millions of requests/sec (DLang at Dunnhumby)
Solid engineering craft: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling authorship, mentoring and workshop/teaching experience
Broad full-stack and DevOps versatility (Node.js, TypeScript, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS) with event-driven platform experience
concerns: Minimal professional C++/STL experience — the role's primary skill — and none recent
No industrial-cybersecurity background (IEC 62443, SDL) or IoT protocol experience (MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus)
No automation-machinery or industrial-domain exposure; career trajectory points toward web/product engineering, not embedded/industrial platforms

key_factors.factor: Strong low-latency and event-driven systems experience
